title: Model Evaluation Quiz
description: Test your model evaluation and ML best practices knowledge.

questions.question: Why is accuracy a misleading metric for imbalanced datasets (e.g., 99% negative, 1% positive)?

options.text: Accuracy cannot be calculated for imbalanced data
A model predicting always-negative gets 99% accuracy while detecting no positives — the metric hides poor performance
Accuracy is only for regression problems
High training error and high test error
Low training error but significantly higher test error
Low training error and low test error
High training error but low test error
Classifies data into K predefined labelled categories
Partitions unlabelled data into K clusters by minimising within-cluster variance
Selects the K most important features
